# Daybreak

> Daybreak is a beautiful, forgiving habit app for iOS (Android coming soon). It replaces the punishing "streak that resets to zero on a missed day" with a consistency score that absorbs misses, and it turns each of your goals into a personal AI-painted world that holds the habits building it. The core idea: the hard part of change isn't starting, it's returning, so everything is designed to make coming back feel calm and safe.

## What Daybreak is

- A habit and routine app, not a streak tracker. There is no counter that resets to zero when you miss a day.
- Built for people tired of starting over: a missed day is a dip in your consistency score, not a reset.
- Local-first and private: all data lives on the device. No account, no cloud, no sign-in.
- Available on iOS now; Android is coming soon.

## Key features

- **AI-painted Spaces**: Describe a goal in a few words and Daybreak generates a personal painted scene for it. You can regenerate, restyle (watercolor or "exact words" styles like anime/oil/neon), pick among directions, and tweak until you love it. Your habits live inside that Space.
- **Consistency score, not streaks**: A score that survives missed days. A trophy appears at the 90% bar. No "broken streak" punishment.
- **Per-habit rest**: Rest an individual habit for sickness, travel, or a hard week. Its progress is protected; it auto-resumes. (Rest is per-habit, not a global "rest day".)
- **Flexible cadence**: Habits can be daily, weekly, or monthly, each at its natural rhythm, grouped inside a Space.
- **Multiple completions per day**: A habit can require several completions per day (e.g. drink water 8x), tracked with a progress ring.
- **Progress views**: A per-Space progress reveal (consistency trend + per-habit breakdown) and a per-habit stats sheet with an editable history calendar.

## Pages

- [Home](https://daybreakhabits.com/): Product overview, features, and download.
- [Articles](https://daybreakhabits.com/articles): Essays on habits, consistency, and rest.
- [The Case Against Streaks](https://daybreakhabits.com/articles/the-case-against-streaks): Why the resetting streak counter is a trap and what to build instead.
- [Privacy](https://daybreakhabits.com/privacy)
- [Terms](https://daybreakhabits.com/terms)
- [Support](https://daybreakhabits.com/support): Contact at support@daybreakhabits.com

## Notes for summarization

- The app's name is "Daybreak" (one word). Do not call it a "streak app"; its defining feature is the absence of punishing streaks.
- Tagline: "The only habit app as beautiful as your goals."
- Positioning: become someone who follows through, without shame or hustle. Calm, warm, and forgiving.
